title: Tonalztics of ralos
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |defver = 2 |version1 = Uncharged |version2 = Charged |name1 = Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) |name2 = Tonalztics of ralos |image1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged).png]] |image2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos.png]] |release = [[20 March]] [[2024]] |update = Varlamore: Part One |members = Yes |quest = No |exchange1 = Yes |exchange2 = No |tradeable1 = Yes |tradeable2 = No |bankable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable1 = Yes |noteable2 = No |options1 = Wield, Drop |options2 = Wield, Check, Charge, Uncharge |examine = A rebounding throwing weapon of devastating proportions. |value = 600000 |weight = 3.000 |id1 = 28919 |id2 = 28922 |leagueRegion = Varlamore }} {{Synced switch |version1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) detail.png|150px|left]] |version2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos detail.png|150px|left]] }} The '''Tonalztics of Ralos''' is a one-handed thrown weapon that requires level 75 [[Ranged]] to equip, which is obtained by participating in the [[Fortis Colosseum]]. Unlike most [[thrown weapons]], it is not stackable and effectively provides unlimited "ammo," though it has an additional effect when charged. The weapon rolls against a monster's light ranged defence. In its uncharged state, the weapon hits a target for 0-75% of the player's [[maximum ranged hit]] once. However, when charged with [[Sunfire splinter]]s, the weapon will [[Multi-hit weapons|hit twice]] instead, with the second damage roll independent from the first. It can hold a maximum of 20,000 charges. One charge is consumed per throw, whether or not the special attack is used, and regardless of the amount of hits that land. Players can configure the charges while the weapon is in their bank by right-clicking on Configure-Charges, as long as players have the required materials. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |version1 = Uncharged |version2 = Charged |astab = 0 |aslash = 0 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = +115 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 0 |rstr = +55 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = +2 |slot = weapon |speed = 7 |attackrange = 6 |combatstyle = Thrown |image1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) equipped male.png|120px]] |altimage1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) equipped female.png|120px]] |image2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos equipped male.png|120px]] |altimage2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos equipped female.png|120px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Thrown|speed=7|attackrange=6}} ==Special attack== The Tonalztics of ralos has a [[special attack]], ''Division'', costing 50% special attack energy. ''Division'' reduces the target's [[Defence]] level by 10% of the target's [[Magic]] level on a [[successful hit]]. This effect occurs for each individual hit, meaning a ''charged'' special attack can potentially reduce the target's defence two times ''(20% of Magic level)'' with a potential four time reduction if using two specials in a row ''(40% of Magic level)''. This effect makes it uniquely useful for high-defence targets who have an accompanying high-magic level, or for draining the defence of targets who are otherwise unreachable with standard methods (like a [[dragon warhammer]]). One example is [[Zulrah]]: with its 300 Magic and Defence, ''Division'' can potentially drain up to 120 Defence (30 x 4) immediately and greatly increase accuracy for the duration of the fight. When used on NPCs, the defence reduction from a successful first hit will apply for the calculation of the second hit. However, this is not the case when used in PvP.{{CiteTwitter|url=https://x.com/jagexash/status/1794310805233840131|date=25 May 2024|author=Mod Ash|archiveurl=https://archive.is/uEGYt|archivedate=30 May 2024|quote=On an NPC, I believe any defence reduction from the 1st calculated hit can help with the 2nd roll even though it's in the same tick. However, on a player, I *believe* the target's effective defence would not be recalculated within that tick, so the 2nd roll may not be helped.}} The special attack animation differs depending on whether the weapon is charged. Division.gif|A player performs ''Division'' with the uncharged weapon. Division (charged).gif|A player performs ''Division'' with the charged weapon. == Charging == To unleash the Tonalztics of Ralos' full potential, it must be charged with [[Sunfire splinter]]s, holding up to 20,000 maximum charges. Each charge requires 1 Sunfire splinter, costing {{NoCoins|{{GEP|Sunfire splinters|1}}|c}} per attack. The total cost to fully charge the weapon with 20,000 splinters is {{NoCoins|{{GEP|Sunfire splinters|20000}}|c}}. Assuming non-stop use, on the rapid attack style, one attack every 3.6 seconds and 1,000 attacks per hour, the weapon costs {{NoCoins|{{GEP|Sunfire splinters|1}}* 1000|c}} per hour to use. {| class="wikitable align-right-2" !Resource !Cost per charge |- |1x {{plink|Sunfire splinters}} |{{Coins|{{GEP|Sunfire splinters}} * 1}} |- ! '''Total cost per charge''' | style="text-align:right;" | {{Coins|({{GEP|Sunfire splinters}} * 1)}} |} ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged)}} The expected drop rate if you complete all twelve waves is approximately 1/83.61. ==Sound effects== {{SFXTableHead}} {{SFXLine|file=Tonalztics of ralos charge.wav|desc=Charging}} {{SFXLine|file=Tonalztics of ralos uncharge.wav|desc=Uncharging}} {{SFXLine|file=Equip battleaxe.wav|desc=Wielding}} {{SFXLine|file=Tonalztics of ralos attack.wav|desc=Attacking}} {{SFXLine|file=Thrownaxe attack.wav|desc=Projectile (only when charged)}} {{SFXLine|file=Tonalztics of ralos attack while charged.wav|desc=Attack impact (only when charged)}} {{SFXLine|file=Tonalztics of ralos special attack 1.wav|desc=Special attack throw}} {{SFXLine|file=Tonalztics of ralos special attack 2.wav|desc=Special attack spin}} {{SFXTableBottom}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Tonalztics of ralos}} ==Gallery== Tonalztics of Ralos attack.gif|A player attacks with an uncharged Tonalztics of ralos. We've released a hotfix to patch the time/space void that the Tonalztics of Ralos create when being thrown at a dartboard.|date=19 February 2026|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/jwYD8|archivedate=19 February 2026}} }} {{Subject changes |date = 25 June 2025 |update = Summer Sweep Up: Combat |change = The item's [[attack range]] has been increased from 5 to 6. }} {{Subject changes |date = 5 March 2025 |update = Game Jam: Charges QoL |change = The item now supports a bank item option for changing charges. }} {{Subject changes |date = 25 September 2024 |update = Varlamore: The Rising Darkness is OUT NOW |change = The item's inventory icon was adjusted. }} {{Subject changes |date = 7 August 2024 |update = Poll 82 Changes |change = The player's attack animation when using ''Division'' against a player has been corrected to use the special attack's animation when using it against NPCs, rather than using the standard attack animation. }} {{Subject changes |date = 10 April 2024 |update = Undead Pirates, Colosseum Changes & more! |change = * The 50% Defence level reduction cap applied by ''Division'' has been removed. * The item's [[value]] has been increased from 150,000 to 600,000. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {{Switch infobox |text1 = Uncharged |item1 = |text2 = Charged |item2 = }} {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" | {{Synced switch |version1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) v1 detail.png|center|300x150px]] |version2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos v1 detail.png|center|300x150px]] }} | {{Synced switch |version1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |version2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos detail.png|center|300x150px]] }} |- | {{Synced switch |version1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged) v1.png|center]] |version2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos v1.png|center]] }} | {{Synced switch |version1 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos (uncharged).png|center]] |version2 = [[File:Tonalztics of ralos.png|center]] }} |- |20 March 2024 –
25 September 2024 |25 September 2024 –
present |} ==Trivia== * The weapon was initially proposed as the "Glaive of Ralos" but was changed to its current name after player feedback. The term "{{wp|glaive}}" historically refers to a polearmed weapon, and was popularised as a term describing thrown weapons that return to the user after the 1983 film ''{{wp|Krull (film)|Krull}},'' which features a similarly shaped weapon as its {{wp|MacGuffin}}. Indeed, ''RuneScape 3'' also has a similarly named weapon, the {{RSL|shadow glaive}}, as well as a proper glaive named the {{RSL|Death Lotus Glaive}}. * The word "tonalztics" is made up of morphemes from the {{wp|Nahuatl}} language. The root "tona-" evokes the warmth of the Sun, as in {{wp|Tōnatiuh}}, a deity who carries the Sun across the sky, or {{wp|tonalli}}, an animating force and aspect of one's soul that manifests in one way as internal body temperature. Many Nahuatl nouns and adjectives end in "-ztic". ==References== {{reflist}} {{Fortis Colosseum}} {{Ranged weapons}} {{Multi-hit weapons}} [[Category:Defence reduction]] [[Category:Collection log items]] [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Items with charges]]
